patch.value: Bare extension command group (pm changelog / pm graph) exits 0 with zero output instead of rendering group help

2026-07-06 audit #12 sandbox (v2026.7.6 tarball): running an extension-provided command group with no subcommand (pm changelog, pm graph) prints NOTHING and exits 0. Root cause: root configureOutput writeErr is a no-op (usage errors render in the catch path), so commander's help-on-error output for action-less groups is swallowed, and handleRunPmCliHelpDisplayError then treats commander.help as an already-rendered success parse. Silent success is the worst never-block failure mode: agents get no subcommand discovery and a false success signal.
Bare invocation of an extension command group renders the group help (subcommand list) instead of exiting silently; explicit --help output unchanged; spec covers bare-group invocation.
ensureCommandPath now attaches a help-rendering action to created intermediate groups; bare group invocation prints the subcommand list on stdout (terminal registrations still override the handler).
Bare pm changelog / pm graph render group help instead of silent exit 0.
Verified on rebuilt dist in temp workspace: bare pm changelog prints usage + export/generate subcommands, exit 0; new spec asserts help text for bare-group parse; tsc + spec green.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Fixed in audit #12 working tree (src/cli/extension-command-help.ts): bare extension groups render help instead of exiting silently.
